name: Gratiot Community
description_short: Gratiot Community Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates and shared branch access.
description_long:
Gratiot Community Credit Union operates as a member-owned cooperative financial institution serving the Gratiot County area in Michigan. The credit union provides traditional banking services including deposit accounts, lending products, and payment solutions through both physical locations and digital channels. Their website indicates routing number 272476394 and a primary phone line at (989) 463-8321, with branches including locations in Alma with drive-thru services.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of consumer lending products including auto loans (as low as 4.40% APR), personal loans, home equity lines of credit (as low as 6.25% APR), mortgages, student loans, and credit cards (as low as 9.90% APR). They also provide business banking services with dedicated business accounts and fee schedules. Digital services include online banking, a mobile app with card controls functionality, loan applications, check reordering, and access to shared branch networks and ATM locators.

As a credit union, Gratiot Community distinguishes itself through member ownership structure, shared branching access, and membership eligibility requirements. They emphasize convenience features such as night deposit drawers at drive-thru locations and card management controls within their mobile application. The institution publishes loan rates, deposit rates, and fee schedules publicly, suggesting transparent pricing.

The primary limitation is that as a credit union, membership eligibility requirements apply—not all consumers can join. The website provides limited detail about specific membership criteria, rates for all products, or detailed fee structures beyond referential navigation menus. Online loan application functionality is mentioned but not demonstrated in available content. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.40% APR
Home equity lines of credit available from 6.25% APR
Credit card products with rates as low as 9.90% APR
Mobile app with Card Controls for real-time card management and fraud prevention
Shared branch network access and ATM locator tool for extended convenience
Night deposit drawers at drive-thru locations for after-hours banking
Comprehensive lending options including auto, personal, home equity, mortgages, and student loans
cons: Membership eligibility requirements restrict access to some consumers
Limited transparency on specific membership criteria and full rate details on website
Loan application process requires navigation to separate portal with minimal detail provided
No information about membership fees, account maintenance costs, or overdraft policies visible
Geographic service area appears limited to Michigan region based on routing number and branch locations
best_for: Michigan residents in Gratiot County area seeking member-owned credit union services
Borrowers shopping for competitive auto loan and home equity rates
Business owners needing credit union business accounts and services
Consumers wanting mobile banking with advanced card control features
diagnosis: Gratiot Community Credit Union is best suited for Michigan-area residents who meet membership eligibility requirements and seek competitive loan rates with member-owned financial institution benefits. The primary caveat is that membership is restricted to specific eligibility criteria, and the website provides limited detail about membership qualification or complete rate/fee information needed for comprehensive comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
